facebook.caption: Fresh seafood on the beach for $15-30 a person. Aloha Beach Bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is doing something right. 4.7 stars across 2,053 reviews and the price tag still looks like a typo. Grilled fish, cold drinks, sand under your feet. This is the Phu Quoc meal you actually came for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Aloha Beach Bar. Fresh catch, ocean right there, bill under $30. 4.7 stars from 2,053 people and it still feels like a local spot. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu 1.

instagram.caption: $15-30 for seafood this good? Aloha Beach Bar has 4.7 stars and 2,053 reviews to back that up. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Sand, seafood, $30 max. Aloha Beach Bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo delivers every time.

tiktok.caption: Beach seafood for under $30 in Phu Quoc?? Aloha Beach Bar is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
